title: Learning Signals & Reflection
description: Collect learning signals, reflect on outcomes, and adapt personality and behavior

actors.name: GEP Evolver
actors.description: Core evolution orchestrator that drives all signal extraction and learning

actors.name: LLM Hub
actors.description: Remote hub endpoint at /a2a/signal/analyze used for semantic signal extraction (Layer 3)

actors.name: Gene / Capsule
actors.description: Mutated code unit that carries signals_match, learning_history, and anti_patterns

use_cases.name: Extract Signals from Session
use_cases.entry_point: extractSignals({ recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet, recentEvents })
use_cases.description: Multi-strategy orchestrator: builds corpus, runs all 3 extraction layers, merges, post-processes

use_cases.name: Extract Signals via Regex (Layer 1)
use_cases.description: Deterministic regex rules: errsig, memory_missing, protocol_drift, recurring_error, user_feature_request (4 languages), user_improvement_suggestion, perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, tool_bypass, high_tool_usage

use_cases.name: Extract Signals via Keyword Scoring (Layer 2)
use_cases.description: Weighted keyword accumulation across SIGNAL_PROFILES (perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, user_feature_request, user_improvement_suggestion, recurring_error, tool_bypass, evolution_stagnation_detected). Fires when score >= threshold.

use_cases.name: Extract Signals via LLM Semantic Analysis (Layer 3)
use_cases.description: Rate-limited (every LLM_SIGNAL_INTERVAL=5 cycles). Posts corpus_summary + signal_types to LLM Hub /a2a/signal/analyze via curl execSync. Falls back silently on failure.

use_cases.name: Merge Signals from All Layers
use_cases.description: Deduplicates via Set. Logs per-layer stats: score-only, llm-only, confirmed (overlapping) signals.

use_cases.name: Analyze Recent Evolution History
use_cases.description: Reads last 10 events. Returns suppressedSignals (signals seen in 3+ of last 8 events), consecutiveRepairCount, emptyCycleCount, consecutiveEmptyCycles, consecutiveFailureCount, recentFailureRatio, signalFreq, geneFreq.

use_cases.name: Post-process & Prioritize Signals
use_cases.description: Applied after merge: (1) remove cosmetic signals when actionable exist, (2) dedup suppressed signals, (3) force innovation after 3+ repairs, (4) force innovation after 4+ empty cycles, (5) saturation detection at 3/5 empty cycles, (6) failure streak signaling, (7) plateau detection from score trends, (8) default to stable_success_plateau

use_cases.name: Check for Opportunity Signal
use_cases.description: Returns true if any signal in OPPORTUNITY_SIGNALS list (20 signals) is present. Used as gating check before triggering evolution.

use_cases.name: Extract Learning Tags from Capsule
use_cases.description: Maps raw signals to structured learning tags (problem:X, action:X, area:X, risk:X). Tag categories detected: error/exception/failed/unstable → problem:*, protocol/prompt/audit → area:protocol+area:orchestration, perf/performance → area:performance, feature/capability_gap → action:implement+area:capability, stagnation/plateau → area:orchestration+action:evolve, memory/narrative/reflection → area:memory+..., validation/canary/rollback → risk:*. Returns deduped Array<string>.

use_cases.name: Get Tags for Signal Object
use_cases.description: Extracts tags from a single signal object (id, summary, learning_signals fields). Returns Array<string>.

use_cases.name: Score Tag Match
use_cases.description: Scores overlap between signal object tags and a candidate tags array. Returns integer count of matching tags. Used for gene selection ranking.

use_cases.name: Reflect on Evolution Outcome
use_cases.description: Processes outcome of a completed evolution cycle. Reads/writes evolution state files. Internally handles stable_success_plateau, stagnation, repair loops, and orchestration signals.

use_cases.name: Adapt Gene from Learning
use_cases.description: On SUCCESS: broadens gene.signals_match with problem:/area: tags from learningSignals; appends learning_history entry. On FAILURE: appends anti_patterns entry (with mode/reasonClass), does NOT broaden matching.

use_cases.name: Classify Failure Mode
use_cases.description: Returns { mode: 'soft'|'hard'|'none', reasonClass, retryable }. Destructive constraint violations → hard/not-retryable. Validation-only → soft/retryable.

use_cases.name: Build Soft Failure Learning Signals
use_cases.description: Extracts structured tags from validation failures (e.g., problem:performance from stderr containing 'latency').

use_cases.name: Update Personality State
use_cases.description: Manages personality traits: rigor, creativity, risk_tolerance. Exported: normalizePersonalityState(state), personalityKey(state), defaultPersonalityState(). Reads/writes personality_state.json.

use_cases.name: Capture Local State
use_cases.description: Aggregates 5 sections into string report: [Node Identity], [Environment Config], [Evolution State], [Memory & Knowledge], [Skills]. Returns multi-line string for prompt injection.

use_cases.name: Capture Evolution State
use_cases.description: Reads evolution_state.json (cycleCount, lastRun), evolution_solidify_state.json (selected_gene_id, active_task_title), personality_state.json (rigor, creativity, risk_tolerance). Returns string[] lines.

use_cases.name: Generate Personality Report
use_cases.description: Reads personality_state.json + evolution_events.jsonl. Aggregates per-gene success/fail counts via Laplace-smoothed scoreFromCounts(). Renders text dashboard.

key_relationships: GEP Evolver <<uses>> CheckOpportunitySignal (UC08) as gating condition
GEP Evolver <<uses>> ScoreTagMatch (UC11) for gene selection
GEP Evolver <<uses>> AdaptGeneFromLearning (UC13) to evolve gene behavior
GEP Evolver <<uses>> CaptureLocalState (UC17) for prompt context
UC16 (personality) is read by CaptureEvolutionState (UC18) and GenerateReport (UC19)
important_notes: learningSignals.js, reflection.js, personality.js are obfuscated (JavaScript obfuscator); function names are mangled but semantics were inferred from exports and usage in test/scripts
signals.js is clean/readable - the primary signal extraction pipeline with 3 layers (regex, scoring, LLM)
localStateAwareness.js is clean - reads filesystem state for prompt injection
LLM extraction is synchronous via execSync+curl, rate-limited to every 5 cycles
Signal suppression: signals seen 3+ times in last 8 events are suppressed to prevent over-processing
Stagnation detection: 3+ empty cycles triggers explore_opportunity; 5+ triggers force_steady_state
Failure streak: 5+ consecutive failures triggers failure_loop_detected + ban_gene:<topGene>
Gene adaptation: success broadens signals_match; failure only appends anti_patterns (no broadening)
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/learningSignals.js (obfuscated - exports inferred from visible module.exports pattern)
src/gep/reflection.js (obfuscated - function signatures only from IR)
src/gep/personality.js (obfuscated - exports confirmed from scripts/gep_personality_report.js usage)
